notes.note: Currently selected slide number read by screen reader

segment.source: Showing global users. For project-specific users, add a Git plugin link to this project.
Showing global users. For project-specific users, add a MantisBT plugin link to this project.
Showing global users. For channel-specific users, add a Mattermost plugin link to this project.
Select the description to use for the combined item, or enter a custom description.
load all remaining pages from database
no payment plan defined — click edit to create one
no payment plan tiers defined yet
you do not have a RSA keypair yet
save keys to local browser storage
Unable to decrypt your plugin links. Probably you are using a wrong RSA keypair. Either remove this keypair and import the correct PEM or recreate your plugin links.
The environment information seems to be corrupted. You are not logged out, but you cannot use NEXUS at the moment. Please report this to your system administrator and try again.
Your customer universe is waiting to be built. Add your first company and start mapping the relationships, projects, and revenue that will define your success.

Known Sequitur is your comprehensive call management interface for handling customer interactions while on the phone. It provides everything you need during a call: add new projects and leads, update existing project information, capture additional contact details and employees, view important customer statistics, and identify missing information (like birthdays or lead sources) so you can ask the caller directly.
use the search field on the left to find and open an existing contact
once selected, you'll be taken to the customer's tracking dashboard
connect your phone client to automatically open known sequitur when receiving calls
Replace phoneNumber with the actual caller's phone number. This will automatically look up the customer or allow you to create/link a new one.
The phone number could not be resolved to any existing customer in your database.
to proceed with this call, you can either
link this number to an existing company
create a new company for this caller
Use the options in the left panel to get started.
accumulated revenue of the last 12 months
Customers need valid address information with geographic coordinates to appear on the map.
days until project is either ordered or failed
Circular dependency detected. Please break the dependency chain.
Your dashboard is empty. Click the edit button in the toolbar to enter edit mode, then drag widgets from the panel on the right onto this canvas.
NEXUS needs a company entry to represent your organization. This will become your "my company" reference throughout the system.
Choose the language, country and currency for your NEXUS instance.
Your NEXUS instance is configured and ready to use.
you can change this anytime in settings
lead success rate of the last 12 months
data will appear once time tracking entries are recorded
data will appear once projects with predictions are completed
remaining months until end of year
estimated remaining time to complete (without weekly)
Track every cost, master every margin. Add your first expense and gain complete visibility into your operational spending.
Upload a bank CSV export to visualize your cash flow and uncover the financial pulse of your business.
Set up your first cash register to start tracking point-of-sale transactions with precision.
Your financial story is yet to be written. Create your first invoice and set the engine of your business in motion.
Automate your recurring revenue. Set up standing orders and let NEXUS handle the rhythm of your business.
item has VAT but company has VAT ID
item has no VAT but company has no VAT ID
current email address. real addres may differ!
drop files here to add to
Drop files here to build your marketing asset library. Supports images, videos, documents and more.
supports images, videos, documents, presentations and more
primary channel will be used as the default for new prospects
no workflows available. create workflows in the workflows tab first.
no metrics available. metrics are created automatically when workflows are seeded.
set a target value for this initiative
number of days after workflow starts
this activity will be scheduled after the selected dependency
required activities must be completed before moving to next steps
display a quick action button next to this activity on prospect pages
no initiatives found. create your first marketing initiative to get started.
Describe the goals and scope of this initiative...
e.g., Email Open Rate, Revenue Generated
this can be overridden per initiative or activity
select existing company or create new
enter at least 2 characters to search
select a prospect to view details and manage activities
no prospects found. add prospects manually or through the firefox addon.
no activities yet. click "add activity" to create the first step.
external dependency - waits for external event
create a workflow to automate prospect engagement.
Describe the purpose and steps of this workflow...
active workflows can be attached to initiatives

Build your product catalog from the ground up. Use the create_new_folder icon in the left panel to add your first product group, then populate it with products. A well-structured catalog is the foundation of every great business.
Revenue rank based on total sales value
Total revenue generated from this product
Speed rank based on average days from item creation to invoice
Average days between adding to invoice and invoice creation
Repurchase rank based on average purchases per customer
no project references found for this product
project focus in the last 30 days
Do you really want to log out?
Filter ID is optional - if specified, only issues matching that filter will be shown. If empty, shows assigned issues by default.
LocalAI Proxy uses username + token authentication through a proxy service.
NEXUS plugin configuration is managed automatically.
all your plugin tokens will be encrypted on your client with your private key
please hand in your sick note when you are back to work
thank you for your sick note. get well soon
Pauschalen werden automatisch basierend auf dem gewählten Reiseland gesetzt (ARVVwV 2025).
Tagespauschalen können bei einer Reisedauer von weniger als acht Stunden nicht angesetzt werden.
Reiseende muss nach dem Reiseanfang liegen.
Keine Reisekostenabrechnung mit mehr als 100 Tagen erlaubt.
Info: PDF muss noch manuell an die Geschäftsführung für die weitere Verarbeitung weitergeleitet werden. Im NEXUS wird nichts gespeichert.
Please select a leave allowance pool on the left
urlaubsstunden größer, als an diesem tag gearbeitet wird
working days per week with an average of hours per day.
Projects are born in the customer detail view — find a customer, open their profile, and create a project from there. Every great project starts with a relationship.
real working time vs. quote estimation (only finished projects)
No uptime monitors configured yet. Click "Add Monitor" to start tracking the heartbeat of your services.
Cannot create dependency to the same milestone
Dependencies can only be created between milestones of the same project
Total hours for this milestone (distributed across working days)
Are you sure you want to delete this milestone?
Are you sure you want to delete this task?
no uptime monitors linked to this project
No debriefs yet. Create the first one.
Add any additional notes about this debrief...
Add milestones manually or track your invoice items with milestones to get started.
no invoice items available to track
Are you sure you want to delete all milestones? This action cannot be undone.
use all predictions from this user
All items created here are assigned to the default product (see project settings).
add connections from the list on the right
sum for currently loaded table items (might not be complete)
full salutation line, localized and formal/informal based on contact settings
payment duration in days (cascades: project → customer → default)
renders the project's payment plan as a table
name of the user that has sent the vacation request
name of the user that has approved the vacation request
calculation of the deducted hours for the vacation request
reason given, why a vacation request has been denied
these settings allow for an easy email popup to inform HR about sicknesses, so they can process it.
the sick note information to be sent
this factor is applied to the estimated time (PT) of invoice items when converting them to milestones, to account for project complexity and buffer time.
initial time budget for user on new project creation
email address for framework update notifications
Send an email to the project manager when hours invested divided by estimated work exceeds a threshold. Notifications reset automatically if the ratio drops below the threshold again.

Define global default payment plans by project budget size. Tiers are evaluated in order — the first tier whose threshold exceeds the project's net value is used. The last tier (no threshold) serves as the catch-all. Use [payment-plan] in quote text to insert the plan.
Connectors link NEXUS to external services via encrypted credentials. Values are stored securely and never exposed again after saving — leave fields blank to keep existing values unchanged.
The default Super Admin account is still active. Once you have your own admin account set up, delete this account to improve security.
Enter the estimated workload in hours for this milestone
Most objects in NEXUS support right-click context menus with quick actions. You can easily spot them — their background turns teal when you hover over them.
Context-aware objects support multi-selection just like in Windows Explorer. Use Ctrl+Click to add items to your selection, and Shift+Click to select a range up to that item.
